loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active energy import and reactive energy for the month — per-phase breakdown and targets are not configured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive power trends over the last 7 days; rated and contracted power limits are unknown for this asset.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power and energy-derived loss/efficiency metrics — per-phase and export-specific energy data is not used for this aggregate efficiency assessment.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing load factor (%) as a proxy for load anomalies — the meter does not log event counts (dips/surges), so those slots are blank.
